# `transport/state_ev_registrations_count`

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by `python -m yen_gov indicator-pages`. Do not hand-edit. -->

**Title**: EV registrations by state and vehicle category  
**One-line**: Annual count of electric vehicles newly registered in each state, broken down by vehicle category (2-wheeler, 3-wheeler, 4-wheeler, bus, others).  
**Source artifact last modified**: 2026-05-16 (auto-generated)  
**Source artifact**: [`datasets/indicators/in/transport/state_ev_registrations_count.json`](../../../../datasets/indicators/in/transport/state_ev_registrations_count.json)

## Definition

Annual count of electric vehicles newly registered in each state, broken down by vehicle category (2-wheeler, 3-wheeler, 4-wheeler, bus, others). Sourced from MoRTH VAHAN dashboard via NITI Aayog ICED. Note: VAHAN excludes Telangana for some years (state runs its own RTO database) — gaps are real, not data-pipeline failures.

| Default mode | `absolute` |

## Coverage

- **Temporal**: 2000-04..2025-04 (26 periods)
- **Spatial**: India (states + UTs) (35 entities)
- **Rows on disk**: 10,920

## Methodology vintage

MoRTH VAHAN registration database (excludes Telangana for some years; some early-year zero values reflect absent registration tooling, not absent vehicles).
